pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 25, export_result.sh line 38, task.json description line 3
Odoo 17 CRM module standard model; setup_task.sh lines 32, 99; export_result.sh lines 37, 99
Odoo CRM probability field ranges 0-100%; setup_task.sh line 39 sets initial value to 10.0; verifier.py line 102 checks for 90.0; export_result.sh line 105 exports probability field

pi_items.verified_value: 0, 1, or 2 per Odoo 17 standard; value 3 does not exist in standard Odoo 17 CRM
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Odoo 17 AVAILABLE_PRIORITIES = [('0','Low'), ('1','Normal'), ('2','High')]; setup_task.sh line 38 sets initial priority to '0'; verifier.py line 94 expects '3' which contradicts Odoo 17 standard specification; export_result.sh line 105 exports priority field as string

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic opportunity named 'Solar Panel Upgrade - Smith Residence' with initial values of priority='0' and probability=10.0. It requires creating a server action named 'Mark as Hot Lead' on the crm.lead model that updates the opportunity to probability=90.0. The metadata claims the expected priority value is '3', but standard Odoo 17 Community CRM only supports priority values 0 (Low), 1 (Normal), and 2 (High). No priority value of '3' exists in the standard Odoo 17 implementation without custom module modifications.
